title: Year in Review
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2025-12-22_year-in-review_img_tankerrr-228129_89290ba50318.jpg
It has been another year for the books in the tanker markets, with almost too many events to recap. We covered the first half of the year in our earlier report titled "All about US". In this report we will limit our focus to recapping some of the key developments of the second half of the year.
